# Document Templates

Templates for PRDs, implementation plans, work items, and status updates.

## Included Templates

- `prd-template.md`: product requirements document
- `implementation-plan-template.md`: execution plan tied to a PRD
- `work-item-template.md`: individual trackable work item
- `daily-template.md`: daily goals sheet
- `status-update-template.md`: concise status report

## Usage

Copy the relevant template to the appropriate directory (`docs/PRD/`, `docs/plans/`) and fill in the details.
